title: EV Charger Network Expansion
background: An energy company is deciding whether to build an EV charging network in midsized cities.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Defines target market and customer segments
Assesses market size, growth, and competitive intensity
Evaluates entry options, economics, and risks
Recommends whether and how to enter
great_answer_includes: Identifies regulatory, operational, and channel barriers
Compares build, partner, and acquisition routes
Uses a test-and-scale plan with clear milestones
Explains what would make the entry unattractive
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear market entry structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
